2606.21777.title: CalVerT: Augmenting Agents with Calibrated Verifier Telemetry Improves Action and Learning in Knowledge-Intensive Tasks
2606.21777.paper_summary: LLM agents in knowledge intensive question answering take retrieval and reasoning actions with incomplete knowledge about whether their current answer is uncertain, unsupported, or already complete. This produces two failure modes: committing to confident but unsupported answers, which hurts accuracy, and over-retrieving when the evidence in hand already suffices, resulting in wasted compute. To give agents a more complete picture of the state space they are operating in, we introduce calibrated verifier telemetry (CalVerT), which augments the agent's state with additional telemetry: a calibrated self-confidence score and a grounding verifier score. We show that CalVerT can improve agents in both training-free and training-based settings. On four QA benchmarks, we find that CalVerT raises F1 by triggering retrieval in cases where agents over-rely on parametric knowledge, while cutting redundant retrieval in cases where agents have sufficient context to answer. We show that CalVerT can augment existing QA frameworks without training. Moreover, CalVerT also improves trained systems: by simply augmenting an agent's state with telemetry, we observe improvements after reinforcement learning, as compared to an agent with identical training but no CalVerT telemetry.
2606.21777.paper_summary_zh: LLM 代理在知識密集型問題回答中，對於其當前答案是否不確定、未被支持或已經完整，採取檢索和推理行動時，知識是有限的。<lb/>這產生了兩種失敗模式：堅持自信但未被支持的答案，這會損害準確性，以及在手頭證據已經足夠的情況下過度檢索，導致計算資源浪費。<lb/>為了讓代理對其運作的狀態空間有更全面的了解，我們引入了校準驗證者遙測（CalVerT），它通過額外的遙測來增強代理的狀態：一個校準的自信心分數和一個基礎驗證者分數。<lb/>我們展示了 CalVerT 可以在無需訓練和基於訓練的設置中改善代理。<lb/>在四個 QA 基準上，我們發現 CalVerT 通過在代理過度依賴參數知識的情況下觸發檢索，提高了 F1，同時在代理擁有足夠上下文以回答的情況下減少了冗餘檢索。<lb/>我們展示了 CalVerT 可以在不進行訓練的情況下增強現有的 QA 框架。<lb/>此外，CalVerT 也改善了經過訓練的系統：通過簡單地用遙測增強代理的狀態，我們觀察到在強化學習後的改進，相較於具有相同訓練但沒有 CalVerT 遙測的代理。
2606.21777.author: Ashwin Vinod et.al.
2606.21777.authors: Ashwin Vinod, Ying Ding, Elias Stengel-Eskin
